que: What is the primary function of the Dismissible widget?
options: To allow swiping to remove/dismiss a widget

que: Which property is strictly required for Dismissible?
What callback is triggered when the dismiss action is completed?
What is the 'background' widget used for?
options: It renders behind the child and is revealed during the swipe
It sets the background color of the child
It is shown when the item is selected

que: Can you restrict the swipe direction?
options: No, it always swipes both ways
No, it depends on the child width
